name: planboard
description: Turn a rough idea into a complete project specification before writing any code.

interface.shortDescription: Create a complete, reviewable project plan before coding.
interface.longDescription: PlanBoard turns a rough idea into an approved product, technical, data, and implementation plan through a structured, human-in-the-loop workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $planboard to turn a rough idea into an approved implementation plan.
Use $planboard-ps when you already have a Problem Statement and proposed solution.
